faq.q: How many GCC centers does Birdeye operate in India?
faq.a: Birdeye operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Birdeye have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Birdeye's India GCC presence is in Gurugram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Birdeye run in India?
faq.a: Birdeye runs R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Birdeye's India GCCs?
faq.a: Birdeye's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Birdeye's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 17 leaders at Birdeye's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
